full_text:
Xue Hong 薛洪
ARomance of the Three KingdomsEncyclopedia officer profile.
Xue Hong (薛洪). Formally took over on the death of Zhang Yang but had very little power. Surrendered to Cao Cao. Xue Hong was affiliated with Zhang Yang, Sui Gu, and the Wei Kingdom.
